# Palo Alto Advanced Dentists

> A full-service dental practice at 4191 El Camino Real, Palo Alto, CA 94306.
> Phone: (650) 324-4900 | Hours: Mon–Sat 9am–6pm | Sunday: Closed

## About

Palo Alto Advanced Dentists (PAAD) has been serving the Silicon Valley community since 2005. The practice is led by Dr. James Ho, DMD, MPH, a Harvard School of Dental Medicine graduate. PAAD offers a complete range of dental treatments under one roof — from routine cleanings to complex surgical procedures — making it a true one-stop dental practice.

The practice has been recognized as a Bay Area Best Dentist and maintains a 5-star rating across Google and Yelp reviews.

## Our Doctors

- **Dr. James Ho, DMD, MPH** — Founder & Lead Dentist. Harvard School of Dental Medicine. Languages: English, Mandarin, Cantonese, Taiwanese.
- **Dr. Ryan Charles Ho, DMD** — Associate Dentist. Roseman University College of Dental Medicine. Languages: English, Mandarin, Cantonese.
- **Dr. Sara Hamed-Negahdar, DDS** — Associate Dentist. University of Southern California (USC) Herman Ostrow School of Dentistry. Languages: English, Persian.
- **Dr. Pedro Avendaño, DDS** — Associate Dentist. University of Chile School of Dentistry. Languages: English, Spanish.
- **Dr. Eddy Wang, DMD** — Associate Dentist. University of Pittsburgh School of Dental Medicine. Languages: English, Mandarin, Taiwanese.

## Services

- Same-Day Dental Implants (5-in-1 procedure)
- Invisalign Elite orthodontics
- Porcelain Veneers
- Teeth Whitening
- Root Canal Treatment
- PINHOLE Surgical Technique (minimally invasive gum recession treatment)
- Preventive Cleanings & Exams
- Fillings & Restorations
- Wisdom Tooth Extraction
- Sinus Lift & Bone Grafting
- Orthodontics

## Languages Spoken

English, Mandarin, Cantonese, Taiwanese, Spanish, Persian

## Service Area

Palo Alto, Mountain View, Menlo Park, Los Altos, Sunnyvale, Redwood City, Stanford, and the broader Silicon Valley / San Francisco Bay Area.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Do you accept dental insurance?**
Yes. We work with most major dental insurance plans. Contact our office at (650) 324-4900 to verify your coverage.

**Do you offer same-day implants?**
Yes. We offer a 5-in-1 same-day implant procedure — extraction, bone graft, implant placement, and temporary crown in a single visit.

**What is PINHOLE surgery?**
The PINHOLE Surgical Technique is a minimally invasive treatment for gum recession. It requires no scalpel or sutures and involves a tiny pinhole incision to reposition the gum tissue.

**Do you treat dental emergencies?**
Yes. We reserve emergency slots every day. Call (650) 324-4900 immediately for urgent dental care.

**Are you accepting new patients?**
Yes, we welcome new patients of all ages.

**What languages does the staff speak?**
Our team speaks English, Mandarin, Cantonese, Taiwanese, Spanish, and Persian.

**How long has the practice been open?**
Since 2005.
